final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-childrens-book
Asset type: children's picture book spread, double-page illustration
Primary request: a whimsical forest concert with cute animals playing instruments
Scene/backdrop: enchanted forest clearing with fairy-tale mushroom houses and a rainbow arching overhead
Subject: cute rabbit playing cello, squirrel playing flute, gathered forest animals as audience
Style/medium: children's book illustration, whimsical and storybook aesthetic, soft watercolor textures
Composition/framing: wide scene showing the full forest clearing, mid-distance view capturing both performers and background
Lighting/mood: bright and cheerful daylight, magical and joyful atmosphere
Color palette: vivid and bright colors - lush greens, rainbow spectrum, warm earth tones, cheerful pastels
Materials/textures: soft painted textures, rounded friendly shapes, smooth watercolor washes
Constraints: keep all animals cute and friendly with expressive faces, maintain child-appropriate whimsical style
Avoid: realistic proportions, dark shadows, scary elements, photorealistic rendering, cluttered composition
